title: Wrong associativity of multiply/divide
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_operations (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value1 FLOAT, value2 FLOAT, value3 FLOAT);
INSERT INTO test_operations (id, value1, value2, value3) VALUES (1, 12.0, 5.0, 3.0);
SELECT value1 * value2 / value3 AS result FROM test_operations;
SELECT (value1 * value2) / value3 AS result FROM test_operations;
SELECT value1 * value3 / value2 AS result FROM test_operations;
key_bug_features: Incorrect order of operations for multiplication and division
